verdict_reasoning: IZUMO1 is a single-pass type I transmembrane Ig-like protein with an extracellular domain, anchored on the sperm plasma membrane where it mediates sperm-egg fusion via binding to JUNO on the oocyte. It has its own TM anchor with exposed ectodomain, but expression is strictly restricted to the male germline (spermatids/spermatozoa), placing it in the tissue/lineage-restricted surface bucket rather than `yes`.
